regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Whanganui typically charge $60–$80/hr. Supply-and-lay carpet is usually quoted per m²: expect $35–$58/m² for mid-range carpet installed.

businesses.name: Barry Flooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet installation, stretches, and repairs with over a decade of experience, servicing Whanganui and the wider lower North Island.

businesses.name: T & C Drake Limited
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial carpet and vinyl floor installation serving Whanganui and surrounding Rangitikei/Manawatu areas.

businesses.name: Puroa
businesses.known_for: Carpet and vinyl flooring specialist for rental and residential properties across Whanganui and the lower North Island.
